heroTitle: A clear space to build better
heroSubtitle: SpaceLogic centralizes the management of your architectural projects in an intuitive, collaborative environment.
featuresTitle: Everything you need to manage your projects
feature1: Centralized and customized management of all your architectural projects
feature2: Real-time collaboration with your team and partners
feature3: Precise tracking of deliverables and milestones
feature4: Integrated library of standards and resources
featuresGroupOneTitle: Everything you need to structure clear functional and technical programs
featuresGroupOneItem1: Guided structuring of PFTs following a professional process
featuresGroupOneItem2: Clear organization of functional units, spaces, and rooms
featuresGroupOneItem4: Deliverables that are consistent, readable, and defensible
featuresGroupTwoTitle: Master your areas from the start
featuresGroupTwoItem2: Management of conversion factors F1, F2, and F3
featuresGroupTwoItem3: Automatic consistency between units, rooms, and totals
featuresGroupTwoItem4: Tracking gaps between program, scenario, and project
featuresGroupTwoItem5: A single source of truth for the whole team
